creator: yoshiaki@kt.rim.or.jp
text:
When large size (near 1GByte) data writing to DDS (HP35480A),
system suddenly reboot.

This problem can not catch DDB or kernel debugger.

[2.2-970205-GAMMA i386 + AHA2940 + HP35480]
Same probrem have happen.

[2.2-BETA i386 + AHA2940 + HP35480]
No probrem.

[2.2-970215-GAMMA i386 + AHA1522 + HP35480]
No probrem.

How-To-Repeat: Anytime I do, this probrem have happen.
